groq_prompt:
You are looking at 3 sequential frames from a cricket match showing a batting shot or bowling delivery.

Identify from this list:
- cover_drive: front-foot drive through cover region
- pull_shot: short ball pulled to leg side
- hook_shot: short ball hooked over the keeper
- straight_drive: drive straight back past the bowler
- square_cut: late cut shot square on off side
- sweep: front-foot horizontal-bat shot to leg side
- defensive_block: defensive forward push, no scoring intent
- yorker: bowling — full-pitched ball at the toes (bowler delivery)
- bouncer: bowling — short rising delivery (bowler delivery)

Respond in EXACTLY this format, nothing else:
SHOT: <one of: cover_drive|pull_shot|hook_shot|straight_drive|square_cut|sweep|defensive_block|yorker|bouncer|unknown>
CONFIDENCE: <number from 0.0 to 1.0>
